creator: wollman@khavrinen.lcs.mit.edu
text:
magicpoint uses a bizarre mixture of autoconf and imake for
	its configuration.  In one of the imake-controlled bits,
	a source file references the obsolete System V header file
	<malloc.h> and thus won't compile on -current.

How-To-Repeat: 	See http://bento.freebsd.org/errorlogs/5-latest/magicpoint-1.09a.log
